description: Think about what went right and what went wrong.

success.narrative: You know exactly what you need to work on. Clear eyes for next year.

description: No breaks. Start building for next season immediately.
risk: Great for growth but risk burnout.

success.narrative: You came back from the offseason visibly stronger and faster.

failure.narrative: Pushed too hard over the break. Starting next season already banged up.

text: Take a break and enjoy life
risk: Great for mental health. Could lose your edge.

success.narrative: Best offseason ever. Recharged and motivated.

failure.narrative: Maybe too much fun. Took a while to get back into football shape.
